_comment: Settings for investor-outreach.js. Secrets come from env vars, NOT this file.
_dailyCap: Max investor emails per run. Keep low (8-12) — quality over volume.
_dryRun: TRUE = generate and print emails but send nothing. Review at least once, then set false.
_sourceSheetNames: All tabs in the investors spreadsheet to discover contacts from.
_outreachSheetName: Tab created by setup-investor-sheets.js with enriched columns (Email, Status, etc.).
_delaySecondsBetweenEmails: Pause between sends — investor emails need more care than professor ones.
